title: heuchera alpina
intro: Heuchera alpina, also known as alpine coral bells, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This perennial plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The plant's roots and leaves have been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Heuchera alpina can be used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves and roots can be dried and used in capsules or as a powder for medicinal purposes.
